project_scope: Build a state-driven multi-agent viral app factory with Discord login, project templates, deployment hooks, and Stripe billing.

contract_signatures: export interface User { id: string; email: string; name: string; createdAt: Date; }
export interface Project { id: string; ownerId: string; name: string; template: ProjectTemplate; status: ProjectStatus; }
export enum ProjectStatus { Draft = 'draft', Building = 'building', Deployed = 'deployed', Failed = 'failed' }
export interface ProjectTemplate { id: string; name: string; stack: string; defaultConfig: Record<string, unknown>; }
export interface DeploymentHook { id: string; projectId: string; provider: 'vercel' | 'railway' | 'netlify'; config: Record<string, unknown>; }
export interface BillingSubscription { id: string; userId: string; stripeCustomerId: string; plan: string; status: 'active' | 'canceled' | 'past_due'; }
export interface AuthSession { token: string; user: User; expiresAt: Date; }
nodes.description: Define global shared types, interfaces, and enums used by every other module.

contract_signatures: export function getDiscordAuthUrl(): string
export function fetchDiscordUser(code: string): Promise<Pick<User, 'id' | 'email' | 'name'>>
nodes.description: Low-level Discord OAuth2 helper: build authorization URL and exchange code for user profile.

contract_signatures: export function listTemplates(): ProjectTemplate[]
export function getTemplate(id: string): ProjectTemplate | undefined
nodes.description: Static template registry with default configurations for supported app stacks.

contract_signatures: export function deployToVercel(projectId: string, config: Record<string, unknown>): Promise<DeploymentHook>
nodes.description: Vercel deployment adapter that calls the Vercel API and returns a DeploymentHook record.

contract_signatures: export function createStripeCustomer(user: User): Promise<string>
export function createSubscription(customerId: string, plan: string): Promise<BillingSubscription>
nodes.description: Stripe API client wrapper for customer and subscription creation.

contract_signatures: export function validateSession(token: string): Promise<AuthSession | null>
nodes.description: Validate bearer tokens and return enriched AuthSession objects using the Discord OAuth helper.

contract_signatures: export function createProject(ownerId: string, templateId: string, name: string): Promise<Project>
nodes.description: Create a new Project by resolving the template from the registry and applying default config.

contract_signatures: export function deployProject(projectId: string): Promise<DeploymentHook>
nodes.description: Route deployment requests to the correct provider adapter and persist the resulting hook.

contract_signatures: export function subscribeUser(user: User, plan: string): Promise<BillingSubscription>
nodes.description: Orchestrate Stripe customer creation and subscription setup for a user.

contract_signatures: export function ProjectCard(props: { project: Project }): JSX.Element
nodes.description: Reusable React component that displays a project summary card.

contract_signatures: export { validateSession } from './session';
export { createProject } from './create';
export { deployProject } from './deploy';
export { subscribeUser } from './subscription';
export default function DashboardPage(): JSX.Element
nodes.description: Main dashboard UI that composes auth, project, deployment, billing services and the project card.
